news.headline: 2024 sees U.S. budget deficit soar to the third-highest level ever recorded.
Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico refinances Ps. 1.5 billion credit line with Banco Santander Mexico, extending maturity by 12 months.
news.summary: In Guadalajara, Mexico on October 18, 2024, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. announced the successful refinancing of a credit facility with Banco Santander México, S.A. The refinancing involves a total of Ps. 1.5 billion and extends the maturity period by 12 months. Going forward, the interest on the refinanced facility will be paid monthly at a variable rate of TIIE-28 plus 38 basis points, with no additional fees. The principal amount is scheduled to be repaid on October 17, 2025. The Company, also known as GAP and listed on NYSE under PAC and BMV, successfully completed this significant financial arrangement.

news.headline: ECB's Holzmann: We're on the right way on inflation.
ECB's Holzmann: Inflation is set to tick up in coming months.
Hasbro's Magic reveals debut cards from Marvel partnership.
Dow Jones Futures up for 6th straight week, Tesla earnings looming. Nvidia leads 5 stocks in buy zones. Optimize portfolio.
news.summary: For the sixth consecutive week, the main stock market indices experienced an increase, showing positive trends. Notably, Tesla reported strong earnings, further boosting investor confidence. Among the top performers, Nvidia led the way with five stocks entering buy zones. It is advised to focus on optimizing and adjusting your investment portfolio to capitalize on these market movements. This ongoing bullish trend suggests favorable conditions for traders and investors.

news.headline: S&P 500 reaches highest close ever. Market update.
AI/R, a top AI company, plans to go public in 2025 while projecting over $350 million in revenue.
news.summary: A prominent artificial intelligence company, AI/R, headquartered in San Francisco, declared its intentions to initiate a public offering in 2025. The company, known for offering advanced AI solutions to various clients such as Toyota, BP, and Nestlé on a global scale, anticipates exceeding $350 million in revenue.

news.headline: Dogecoin's value surged after Elon Musk's support. A $100 investment in 2019 could now be worth a lot more.
news.summary: The price of Dogecoin has reached one-month highs this week due to its association with Tesla CEO Elon Musk, who has a history of affecting its volume and price. Musk has been a vocal supporter of Dogecoin, leading to spikes and high volatility. In April 2019, Musk expressed his preference for Dogecoin in a tweet. He also won a Twitter poll for the fictional title of CEO of Dogecoin. This led to significant growth in the value of Dogecoin. Musk's tweets have had a major impact on Dogecoin's market performance, with his endorsement leading to price increases. Additionally, on July 17, 2020, Musk's tweet further boosted the entry point for Dogecoin. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: 'Shiba Inu sees price pump due to Dogecoin rally, as whale withdraws 105.9 billion SHIB valued at $1.99 million.'
news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) has experienced a significant surge in price as a result of the momentum gained from Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) leading a broader rally in meme coins. A recent report from Arkham Intelligence revealed that an unidentified whale withdrew 105.9 billion SHIB, valued at $1.99 million, from Coinbase in three separate transactions. This whale address had no previous on-chain activity, suggesting a potential positive outlook for the meme coin.Lucie, the marketing lead for Shiba Inu, disclosed plans for the launch of the Shiba Inu Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO) and foundation by 2024/2025. She emphasized that the "Shib ecosystem is on the cusp of a transformative change, empowering true holders." This news points towards a promising future for the Shiba Inu community.

news.headline: Langisjór ehf made a mandatory offer to Eik fasteignafélag hf shareholders on 20/09/24. Consent received for 247.190 shares. Transaction completed by 25/10/24.
news.summary: On September 20, 2024, Langisjór ehf. issued a mandatory offer to shareholders of Eik fasteignafélag hf., in accordance with chapters X. and XI. of Act No. 108/2007 on takeovers. The offer, detailed in a document released on the same day, had an expiration date of 1 PM GMT on October 18, 2024. A total of 247,190 shares in Eik were consented to. The Icelandic Competition Authority informed the Offeror on October 14, 2024, that the transaction was not considered a notifiable merger under the Icelandic Competition Act. Payments to accepting shareholders and transfer of shares to the Offeror are scheduled to be completed no later than October 25, 2024.

news.headline: Good Housekeeping Institute celebrated 115th anniversary of seal with exclusive tours and lab activations engaging guests. Al Roker signed copies of his cookbook.
news.summary: Attendees had the opportunity to participate in interactive lab activities and explore products endorsed by the GH Seal. Renowned TODAY Co-Host Al Roker was present to autograph copies of his latest cookbook, "Al Roker's Recipes to Live By." This event took place in New York on October 18, 2024, marking the 115th anniversary of the Good Housekeeping Institute. An array of guests engaged with the event, contributing to its success.

news.headline: S&P: We expect a Labour government will uphold its commitment to strengthen the UK's public finances.
Turning Rock Partners announces $45 million exit from MedShift, a medical technology software company.
news.summary: Private investment firm Turning Rock Partners, located in New York, recently disclosed that it has successfully cashed out its $45 million investment in MedShift, a company specializing in medical technology software. Founded and managed by its owner, MedShift has seen substantial growth with the help of this investment.

news.headline: S&P: We consider that the size of the UK government's majority in parliament should give it latitude to move ahead with its announced policy priorities.
University of Phoenix announces winners of 2024 President’s Award for Excellence in DEI with over 50 nominees recognized.
news.summary: University of Phoenix recently revealed the recipients of the 2024 President’s Award for Excellence in Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Belonging in Research, Scholarship, and Dissertation during the annual Knowledge Without Boundaries (KWB) Research Summit conducted by the College of Doctoral Studies on October 18, 2024. The event featured a presentation by University of Phoenix President Chris Lynne, honoring all winners and nominees. Celebrating diversity and inclusion, the prestigious awards recognized outstanding achievements in the field.

news.headline: FIS will report Q3 2024 results on Nov 4, 2024, with a live webcast at 8:30 am EST for the investment community.
news.summary: Jacksonville, Florida-based financial technology company FIS® (NYSE: FIS) is set to release its third quarter 2024 financial results on Monday, November 4, 2024, before the market opens. The company will host a live webcast of its earnings conference call for investors starting at 8:30 a.m. (EST) on the same day. The webcast can be accessed through the Investor Relations page of FIS’ website, www.fisglobal.com. A replay of the webcast will be available after the live broadcast.

news.headline: Chimerix grants 130,000 stock options to new employee under Nasdaq rule 5635(c)(4) on Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, on October 18, 2024, Chimerix revealed that they granted an inducement award to a new employee on October 16, 2024. This award includes non-statutory stock options enabling the purchase of a total of 130,000 shares of Chimerix's common stock. The Compensation Committee of Chimerix’s Board of Directors sanctioned this award as crucial to the new employee's employment, aligning with Nasdaq Listing rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: NextEra Energy board approves $0.515 quarterly dividend per share, payable on Dec. 16, 2024 to shareholders of record on Nov. 22, 2024.
news.summary: In Juno Beach, Florida, on October 18, 2024, NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE) announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.515 per share. The dividend will be distributed on December 16, 2024, to shareholders recorded on November 22, 2024. NextEra Energy, Inc. stated that...

news.headline: Global dust suppression systems market to grow by USD 4.79 billion (5.6% CAGR) from 2024-2028, aided by AI and mineral processing.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, a report utilizing artificial intelligence projected the Global Dust Suppression Systems Market to increase by approximately USD 4.79 billion between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to have a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 5.6% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Imperial Oil to hold Q3 2024 Earnings Call on Nov 1 at 9am MT with Chairman and CEO Brad Corson. Webcast available.
news.summary: Imperial Oil Limited, trading as IMO on TSE and NYSE American, will have Brad Corson, chairman, president, and CEO, along with Peter Shaw, VP of investor relations, hosting a 2024 Third Quarter Earnings Call on November 1. The call will take place at 9 a.m. MT following the release of third-quarter earnings earlier that day. The event will be available through a webcast, where Mr. Corson will provide a statement before addressing questions from Imperial's stakeholders.

news.headline: Bluesky sees a surge in signups as Elon Musk's tweet on AI training on tweets triggers major user exodus.
news.summary: The actions taken by Elon Musk on Twitter have led to a significant increase in users leaving the platform, resulting in a surge of growth for the decentralized competitor, Bluesky.

news.headline: TILT Holdings' Chief Revenue Officer, Chris Kelly, departs the company; served since Dec. 2022.
news.summary: Phoenix, October 18, 2024 - TILT Holdings Inc., a leading global provider of cannabis business solutions, revealed a significant leadership change. Chris Kelly, who held the position of Chief Revenue Officer since December 2022, has exited the company as of today. TILT, listed as Cboe CA: TILT and OTCQB: TLLTF, offers a range of services in the cannabis industry including inhalation technologies, cultivation, manufacturing, processing, branding, and retail. This announcement marks a pivotal moment for the company as it navigates through the evolving cannabis market landscape.

news.headline: Ultragenyx granted 22,405 restricted stock units to 6 new non-executive officers as an inducement under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc., a biopharmaceutical company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol RARE, announced that they have granted 22,405 restricted stock units of the company’s common stock to six recently hired non-executive officers. These awards were given the green light by the compensation committee of the company’s board of directors and were issued under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan. The grant was officially made on October 16, 2024, in order to entice these new employees to join Ultragenyx, meeting the requirements of Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Globus Medical (NYSE: GMED) to join 40th OTA Annual Meeting in Montréal, Canada, on October 23—26.
news.summary: Audubon, Pennsylvania - On October 18, 2024, Globus Medical, Inc. (NYSE: GMED), a prominent company specializing in musculoskeletal solutions, will be present at the 40th Annual Meeting of the Orthopedic Trauma Association (OTA) in Montréal, Canada from October 23 to 26.

news.headline: Gabelli Dividend & Income Trust announces $107 million purchase of Series M Cumulative Preferred by GAMCO Investors, Inc.
news.summary: In RYE, New York, on October 18, 2024, Gabelli Dividend & Income Trust (GDV) revealed that GAMCO Investors, Inc. (GAMI) and its affiliates acquired $107 million worth of the Fund's Series M Cumulative Preferred Shares. These Series M Preferred shares offer a 4.80% dividend rate, can be puttable/callable by December 2025, and are set for mandatory redemption by December 2026.

news.headline: DBV Technologies to join ACAAI 2024 Congress.

MultiMetaVerse Holdings Limited received a Nasdaq notification for non-compliance with $1 bid price rule and $35M market value rule. Oct. 22 deadline for hearing request or face delisting by Oct. 24. Trading may shift to OTC if delisted.
news.summary: MultiMetaVerse Holdings Limited received a letter from Nasdaq stating non-compliance with bid price & market value rules. The company failed to regain compliance by Oct 14, 2024. They have until Oct 22, 2024, to request a hearing before Nasdaq Hearings Panel, else trading in their shares and warrants will be suspended on Oct 24, 2024. If delisted, securities will trade over-the-counter. Minimum bid price requirement is $1 per share, and $35 million market value of listed securities.

news.headline: S&P: Ratings on the UK remain constrained by its high net general government debt.
S&P: The UK's stable outlook reflects expectations of the UK's stronger economic performance over the next 2-3 years, while general govt deficits slowly moderate.
S&PGR affirms the UK AA/A-1+' ratings, outlook stable.
Sentry Safety Solutions acquires Tactical Safety Solutions to enhance rescue capabilities, expand markets in deal announced in Houston on Oct 18, 2024.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, in Houston, Sentry Safety Solutions, a prominent company offering safety services driven by technology, revealed the acquisition of Tactical Safety Solutions. The latter is known for its top-notch safety professionals, technical rescue teams, and first response services. This move signifies a strategic decision by Sentry Safety Solutions to enhance its market presence and increase its service offerings.

news.headline: Powell Max Limited reports unaudited financial results for first half of 2024. Headquartered in Hong Kong. Nasdaq: PMAX.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Powell Max Limited (Nasdaq: PMAX), a financial communications services provider based in Hong Kong, revealed its unaudited financial performance for the first half of 2024. The company reported on its results for the six-month period concluding on June 30, 2024.

news.headline: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (NYSE: KREF) declares $0.40625 dividend per share for its 6.50% Series A Preferred Stock.
news.summary: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (KREF) declared a dividend of $0.40625 per share of its 6.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, amounting to an annual dividend of $1.625 per share. The dividend will be paid on December 13, 2024, to preferred stockholders of record as of November 29, 2024. KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. is the company involved in this announcement.

news.headline: Fed governor sees potential benefits of stablecoins; US national debt surpasses $35 trillion, increasing by $500 billion in two weeks.
news.summary: The national debt of the United States has exceeded $35 trillion, with an increase of $500 billion in government debt occurring in just the past two weeks.

news.headline: Montenegro delays Do Kwon's extradition once more as appeal verdict nears.
news.summary: A recent study has indicated that approximately 25% of adults in the United States struggle with credit card debt, with an average balance of $6,194 per person. The research also highlights that 35% of individuals aged 18-29 have credit card debt, while 30% of those aged 30-39 are facing similar financial challenges. Furthermore, the study reveals that nearly 20% of Americans believe they will never be able to pay off their credit card debt. Overall, the findings underscore the widespread issue of credit card debt among Americans, particularly among younger age groups.

news.headline: Super PACs invest $1.3M in media ads for House candidates amidst ongoing early voting, across party lines.
news.summary: The Fairshake and Defend American Jobs Political Action Committees disclosed purchases of advertising space for Republican and Democratic contenders in the House of Representatives, with a combined total of $500,000 allocated for these efforts leading up to the upcoming elections.

news.headline: Rebar plans to debut Bitcoin-native MEV Shield by 2024-end with miners holding significant hashrate. CEO Alex Luce reveals.
news.summary: A significant number of Bitcoin miners are being brought on board by the startup, which represents a large portion of the total hashrate of the Bitcoin network, as stated by Alex Luce.

news.headline: Controversial documentary 'The 1916 Project' exposes Margaret Sanger's ties to eugenics and Planned Parenthood's history.
news.summary: A recently released film and book delve into the racist background of Margaret Sanger, the founder of Planned Parenthood, shedding light on her connections to the eugenics movement. This investigation reveals the harrowing implications of her ideologies in modern times. The unveiling took place in Kansas City, Missouri on October 18, 2024. Notably, the organization behind these revelations is the fastest-growing pro-life group in the country.

news.headline: Parke Bancorp Q3 2024 earnings: Net Income $7.5M (+16.3% Q2 2024), Revenue $33.0M (+5.2% Q2 2024), Assets $2.07B (+2.1% vs. Dec 31, 2023), Loans $1.84B (+2.9% vs. Dec 31, 2023)
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, the net income of the company reached $7.5 million, showing a substantial increase of 16.3% from the previous quarter. The revenue also saw growth, hitting $33.0 million in Q3 2024, a 5.2% rise from Q2 2024. The firm's total assets stood at $2.07 billion, marking a 2.1% increase compared to December 31, 2023. Additionally, total loans increased to $1.84 billion, up by 2.9% from the end of 2023. These positive financial indicators reflect the company's strong performance and growth in key areas.

news.headline: Bank of America declares dividends for Q4 2024 for preferred stock series. Board authorizes cash dividends per share.
news.summary: Bank of America Corporation based in Charlotte, North Carolina, disclosed on October 18, 2024, that its Board of Directors has approved regular cash dividends for various series of preferred stock. The dividend per share for each series was not specified. This move indicates the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders who hold these preferred stocks.

news.headline: Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) to distribute $0.015 per unit to holders on Nov 15, 2024, based on oil production from July and gas production from June 2024.
news.summary: Houston-based Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) has disclosed a cash distribution of $0.015000 per unit for its beneficial interest holders. This amount will be payable on November 15, 2024, to those recorded as unitholders by October 31, 2024. The calculation for this distribution is based on reported oil production in July 2024 and natural gas production in June 2024, accounting for accrued costs in August 2024.

news.headline: Scorpio Tankers to release Q3 2024 results on Oct. 29, 2024 with a 9:00 AM EDT conference call. #NYSE:STNG
news.summary: Scorpio Tankers Inc. revealed its upcoming third quarter earnings report release on October 29, 2024. The NYSE-listed company plans to issue the report in the morning EDT and conduct a conference call at 9:00 AM EDT and 2:00 PM CET on the same day.

news.headline: US bank deposits fell to $17.761 tln from $17.83 tln in the prior week.
Public Storage welcomes Chris Sambar as new COO, previously President at AT&T; led 27,000 employees.
news.summary: In Glendale, California, Public Storage (NYSE: PSA) revealed that Chris Sambar has been appointed as the Chief Operating Officer. With a background in leadership roles, Mr. Sambar most recently held the position of President at AT&T Communications, overseeing around 27,000 employees in network operations. Before this, he served in different capacities, such as sales, operations, and corporate strategy, after starting at AT&T.

news.headline: Settlement notice for Walmart stockholders in Delaware court. Plaintiffs vs. Defendants including board members.
news.summary: In a lawsuit filed in the Court of Chancery of Delaware, the Ontario Provincial Council of Carpenters’ Pension Trust Fund, Police & Fire Retirement System of the City of Detroit, and Norfolk County Retirement System have taken legal action derivatively on behalf of Walmart Inc. The plaintiffs have named S. Robson Walton, Gregory B. Penner, Steuart Walton, Timothy P. Flynn, Thomas W. Horton, Marissa A. Mayer, Doug McMillon, Steven S. Reinemund, Phyllis Harris, and Jay Jorgenson as defendants.

news.headline: Seadrill in Hamilton, Bermuda, announces Q3 2024 earnings release and conference call.
news.summary: Bermuda-based Seadrill has revealed its plans for the release of third quarter 2024 earnings, along with a conference call announcement. The company will be sharing financial updates for the mentioned quarter, providing insights into its performance during that period. Interested parties can participate in the conference call to learn more about Seadrill's accomplishments, challenges, and future strategies. This event signifies a critical moment for stakeholders to stay informed about the company's progress. It is yet another step in maintaining transparency and open communication with investors, analysts, and the public.

news.headline: Bank earnings fuel Wall Street to record highs; Oil drops below $70. Gold hits all-time high. Retail sales up. Jobless claims drop. Fed rate cut doubts rise. Mortgage rates spike. Homebuyer activity slows.
news.summary: This week, Wall Street saw significant gains with the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching record highs due to better-than-expected bank earnings and positive guidance. The September retail sales report surpassed forecasts, while a considerable decrease in weekly jobless claims further signaled the strength of the U.S. economy. Some economists are now reconsidering their predictions for the Federal Reserve's next actions, questioning the possibility of additional interest rate cuts as the economy shows robust growth. The surge in Treasury yields had an impact on the housing market, causing mortgage rates to surge and mortgage demand to plummet. This shift led to a notable decrease in homebuyers, resulting in a sharp decline in mortgage applications.

news.headline: SEC intensifies case against SOL and other crypto tokens, not backing down as hoped, in ongoing lawsuit with Binance.
news.summary: Recent updates in the SEC's legal action against Binance show that the regulator is intensifying its lawsuit against SOL and other crypto tokens, instead of relenting as anticipated.

news.headline: United Security Bancshares (NASDAQ: UBFO) reports Q3 earnings, nine months ended Sept 30, 2024. Visit UBFO Investor Relations for details.
news.summary: United Security Bancshares, the holding company for United Security Bank, recently disclosed its operating results for the quarter and nine months ended September 30, 2024. The Board of Directors shared this update, and the company can be found on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol UBFO. To delve into the full release, investors are encouraged to visit UBFO Investor Relations at investors.unitedsecuritybank.com/Q32024-PR. Established in Fresno, California, United Security Bank has been operating since its founding year, serving its customers diligently.
